name: OpenIAP
description: Open cross-platform IAP specification unifying types, error codes and purchase flows across iOS StoreKit and Google Play Billing.

seo.title: OpenIAP — In-app Purchase Optimization
seo.meta_description: OpenIAP: Open cross-platform IAP specification unifying types, error codes and purchase flows across iOS StoreKit and Google Play Billing.

when_to_use: Unifying StoreKit 2 and Google Play Billing under one interface
Handling IAP error codes consistently across iOS and Android
Standardizing purchase restoration flows for cross-platform apps

pros: Open spec unifying IAP types across platforms
Cuts per-platform conditional code for teams
Adopted by multiple OSS IAP libraries
cons: Spec still maturing, breaking changes possible
Not a product, you need an implementing library
Adoption outside OSS libs is still early
Apple and Google may change APIs faster than spec
review.verdict: Useful cross-platform IAP spec for OSS library authors and integrators, but a spec is infrastructure, not a product.
review.best_for: OSS library authors and engineers standardizing IAP across platforms.
review.not_for: Product teams looking for a ready-made subscription service.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
